item.title: Fly tipping on Duchy Street, 1st June
item.description:
Please collect.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Street, Waterloo, Greater London

item.title: Unused bin left, 1st June
item.description:
An unused bin has been left near our house for a couple of weeks. It’s now starting to be filled by public.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Calvert Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging trees, 1st June
item.description:
Several of the trees branches in the park at the junction of Ethelbert Road/Ravensbourne Park are both touching the side walls of my home/right up against my house. All of the trees, which are inside the park. The tree situated at the front gate of the park and which is located at the front of my home, a very large branch of this tree is actually sitting and growing across my roof. I believe this is causing damage to the roof of my home. I will be contacting my insurance company to look into the matter and to take whatever action is necessary. The said trees have not been pruned for several years. I have observed that the trees overhanging on Ethelbert Road were pruned last year and the year before but not the trees adjacent to my home. Also, another tree growing inside the park at the rear of my home, which I believe is an oak tree, a very large tree branch is growing across the top of my garden shed roof. The shed is actually supporting the tree branch. Another very large branch of this tree have grown half way across my rear garden and is very close to the roof of the house. This is an urgent matter and I would appreciate if this matter can be dealt with urgently before any further damaged is caused to my roof.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Ravensbourne Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Section of Croftdown Road, 1st June
item.description:
Signs painted over covering restrictions for parking, this is happening numerous times
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croftdown Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suspicious car parked on Bledlow Close, 1st June
item.description:
The car appears damaged with a broken window and airbag deployed. The number plates have been removed and it is a left hand drive.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bledlow Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over the pavement outside 237 Burrage Road, 1st June
item.description:
Photo taken 1st June 2026. It’s always a mess here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unauthorised dumping of waste in recycling bins, 1st June
item.description:
After our recycling bins were placed on the street for the scheduled fortnightly collection, unknown individuals filled them with general waste. The bins are now completely full and contain multiple refuse bags as well as a chair, preventing us from using them for their intended purpose. We require access to our recycling bins but did not feel it was appropriate to empty the contents onto the street ourselves. Could you please advise how this should be dealt with and whether the contents can be removed? We suspect the waste may have originated from properties facing Morecambe Street. Earlier today we observed what appeared to be a garden clearance taking place, with various items and pots left outside one of the garden entrances which is right next to our house entrance. Later in the day those items had disappeared and our bins had been filled. However, we cannot confirm who was responsible. Any assistance or advice would be appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside Turton House, Barnfield Gardens, 1st June
item.description:
Same old spot people keep dumping large items of waste at the Barnfield Estate, photo taken 1st June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Finsbury Way, 1st June
item.description:
While going for my evening walk, saw this flytipping here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finsbury Way, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st June
item.description:
This is a fly tipping hot spot. As soon as the area is cleared, new fly tipping happens within a few weeks. Please can there be some sort of camera set up to catch these fly tippers, it really brings the area down.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working on Coleman Road opposite to Dowlas Road, 1st June
item.description:
Street light not working on Coleman Road opposite to Dowlas Road. This street light was faulty in 2025 and subsequently was repaired. It has not been on over the last 2 nights.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial waste gas, 1st June
item.description:
The bins seem to have been filled up by someone on the same day they should have been collected/ or have not been collected. The bin is now overflowing with extra commercial waste that seems to have been dumped. This is a large bin for multiple flats
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Navarino Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 Chesterfield Grove -Flytipping, 1st June
item.description:
A wooden pellat is blocking the pavement. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large wooden crate and other furniture pieces left near bins, 1st June
item.description:
Furniture delivery happened but a wooden crate has been left on the street together with a few discarded furniture pieces. If that helps, I've got the exact flat number and owner's details (the shipping label is still attached to the crate).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New Inn Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sink hole opening again, 1st June
item.description:
Alscot way close to the hall Oco cars usually park there so the pavement keeps sinking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alscot Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Restaurant clean-out by a rogue trader, 1st June
item.description:
Equipment and rubbish fly tipped alongside road. Items suggest that a pizza restaurant is being emptied.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Citroen can grey/black, 1st June
item.description:
It had been parked in an awkward position obscuring the vision for other vehicles leaving Ravenscroft crescent wanting to turn both left and right with oncoming traffic. It is dangerous. The vehicle has not moved for approx 3 weeks and it quite damaged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
